title: Recognizer
description: Configuration for speech-to-text recognition. Specifies the STT vendor, language, and vendor-specific options. Can be set at the session level via the 'config' verb or overridden per-verb (e.g. on 'gather').

vendor.description: The STT vendor to use. Must match a vendor configured in the jambonz platform.

label.description: An optional label identifying a specific credential set for this vendor. Used when multiple credentials are configured for the same vendor.

language.description: The language code for speech recognition, in BCP-47 format.

fallbackVendor.description: A backup STT vendor to use if the primary vendor fails or is unavailable.

fallbackLabel.description: Credential label for the fallback vendor.

fallbackLanguage.description: Language code to use with the fallback vendor.

vad.description: Voice activity detection settings for this recognizer.

autogeneratePrompt.description: If true, automatically generate a prompt for the STT vendor based on context (e.g. TTS voice, language). Supported by vendors that accept prompts for recognition guidance.

hints.description: An array of words or phrases that the recognizer should favor. Use this to improve accuracy for domain-specific terminology, product names, or proper nouns.

hintsBoost.description: A boost factor for hint words. Higher values increase the likelihood of recognizing hinted words. Vendor-specific range.

altLanguages.description: Additional languages the recognizer should listen for simultaneously. Enables multilingual recognition.

profanityFilter.description: If true, the vendor will attempt to filter profanity from transcription results.

interim.description: If true, return interim (partial) transcription results as they become available, before the utterance is complete.

singleUtterance.description: If true, recognition stops after the first complete utterance is detected.

dualChannel.description: If true, send separate audio channels for each call leg (caller and callee) to the recognizer.

separateRecognitionPerChannel.description: If true, perform independent recognition on each audio channel. Requires dualChannel.

punctuation.description: If true, enable automatic punctuation in transcription results.

enhancedModel.description: If true, use an enhanced (premium) recognition model if available from the vendor.

words.description: If true, include word-level timing information in transcription results.

diarization.description: If true, enable speaker diarization to identify different speakers in the audio.

diarizationMinSpeakers.description: Minimum number of speakers expected. Used to guide the diarization algorithm.

diarizationMaxSpeakers.description: Maximum number of speakers expected. Used to guide the diarization algorithm.

interactionType.description: A hint to the recognizer about the type of interaction, which can improve accuracy.

naicsCode.description: North American Industry Classification System code. Some vendors use this to improve domain-specific accuracy.

identifyChannels.description: If true, identify and label which channel each transcription segment came from.

vocabularyName.description: Name of a custom vocabulary resource configured at the vendor for improved recognition of specialized terms.

vocabularyFilterName.description: Name of a vocabulary filter configured at the vendor for masking or removing specific words.

filterMethod.description: How filtered vocabulary words should be handled in the transcript.

model.description: The specific recognition model to use. Model names are vendor-specific.

outputFormat.description: The level of detail in recognition results.

profanityOption.description: How profanity should be handled in results.

requestSnr.description: If true, request signal-to-noise ratio information in results.

initialSpeechTimeoutMs.description: Time in milliseconds to wait for initial speech before timing out.

azureServiceEndpoint.description: Custom Azure Speech Services endpoint URL. Only applies when vendor is 'microsoft'.

azureSttEndpointId.description: Azure custom speech endpoint ID for using a custom-trained model. Only applies when vendor is 'microsoft'.

asrDtmfTerminationDigit.description: A DTMF digit that terminates speech recognition when pressed.

asrTimeout.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for a complete recognition result.

fastRecognitionTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for fast recognition mode. Shorter timeout for quick responses.

minConfidence.description: Minimum confidence score (0-1) required to accept a recognition result. Results below this threshold are discarded.
